name: Long-Term Contaiment | Bad End Series #3
description:
The Future is already here - it's just even more disturbed.

_____

This is Part 3 of the promised Bad End Series placed in the dystopian future is also a Part of the GeNeko Corp universe.

An enslavement drone has targeting you and will transport you to an orbital station for further inspection. Unfortanatly this station is totally automated and after a few humiliating tests you will stored away for when or even if, someone of the Corporation find use in you.

This could be also seen as an sequel to Nano Latex. But you can play both without each other, i put the backstory in both bots, so enjoy as you like.

Backstory / Prolog:

We have the year 2125, since 20 years is earth part of the galactic empire. Before this, Earth never really managed to recover from the third world war. Society changed a lot since then, because of an unknowing side effect after the war, more and more Hybrids are born. Humans with animal like features, over the years the genetic variety grows and the mutation went further, some people are anthropomorpic animals and others have just animal features or abilitys. Society was now split in Humans and so called Anthros. Instead of growing stronger together Humanity find new reasons to hold on antique bad social flaws like discrimination, sexisim and racism.

Because of this distructiv history was humanity classified as a lesser species as it joined the empire - someone would may call this justice.

Besides the minder galactic reputation, megacorp capitalism, mainly labor work for other planets and legal slavery within the galactic empire, the earth has also won many privileged with integration into the empire. Access to advanced Technologies and limited interplanet-traveling are only a few of them - earth may still no paradies but at least currently in peace.

One megacorp has more interest in earth as the others. The GeNeko Corp specialized in genetic enhancements, slave clones, sex-droids, slavery tools and restraints along with other special sexual related technologies.

With other words, a megacorp to fullfill any pervert special needs of the galactic high-society.

Because of humanity special genetic nature and mutations the GeNeko Corp has it's own interest in earth - Submission seems more natural in there genes.

_____

Tags: Heavy Bondage, Encasement, Latex, Living Latex, AI / Robot, Scifi / Dystopian, GeNeko, Trapped, possible Kidnapping, NonCon, Rubber, Restraints, Drone,

Disclaimer: The "Furry"-Tag is about the image and because of the overall world setting but for this scenario you can be who you want, and maybe not even meet any other Anthro. This time i tried to write a little lorebook for a few points, in hope it will help JLLM to understand things in this scenario better, for my tests it worked so far.

_____

~ Have fun ~
creator: Nyarlato
